titleStmt.title: SII 18.110: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 110. (B.K. No. 183 of 1933-34.) NIḌŌṆI, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the house of the hereditary Pāṭīl.

summary.p: This inscription which refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva, ruling from the capital Jayantīpura is dated the Chālukya-Vikrama year 40, Manmatha, Pushya śu. 6, Vaḍḍavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa corresponding probably to A.D. 1115, December 24. The week-day was Friday though the Saṁkramaṇa fell on Saturday.

It records the construction of the Vishṇu temple at Niḍuvaṇi, by Mēṇḍeya Barma and registers a gift of land made for the worship and offerings to god Kēśavadēva (of the temple). The gift was made in the presence of the Mahājanas of the place, Daṇḍanāyaka Lakshmarasa, the Mahāpradhāna and Pergaḍe of Tardavāḍi, and others. Yuvarāja Mallikārjuna is stated to be governing Tardavāḍi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhu vanaṁ vapuḥ . yasmādidaṁ jagadajāyata yatra tiṣṭha
tyantē samastamidamastamupaiti yatra . tasmai namaḥ sadasadādivikalpaśūnyacaitanyamātra vapuṣē puruṣōttamāya . © .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā raka satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka
tāraṁ salutta rājadhāni jayantīpurada nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi .
samastabhuvanavikhyātaṁ cāḷukyānvayaprasūtaṁ nirddaḷitavairisaṁghātaṁ . parijana pārijātaṁ . ripurāyakovarabaṁgāṟaṁ .
bappanaṁkakāṟaṁ komaraṁkabhīmaṁ . nayanābhirāmaṁ . ripukumāradēśyābhujaṁga (.) nayyanasiṁgaṁ . śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ . kumā
radikkuṁjaraṁ . vīravidyādharaṁ . sakaḷakaḷādharaṁ . padmanāḷagirivajradaṇḍaṁ . vīṣaḷarāya kuvarajavadaṇḍaṁ . mahālakṣīdēvīla
bdhavaraprasādaṁ . tyāgavinōdaṁ . mūṟurāyakovarahritsellaṁ . sāhasamallaṁ . śrī matribhuvanamallapaṭṭama
hādēviyaraṇugaṁ . sāhasōttuṁgaṁ . nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmadyuvarājaṁ mallikārjjunadēvaru
tarddavāḍināḍaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanajanapadapōṣaṇaprajābharaṇadiṁdāḷuttamire . sukhadinirddalli ©
kaḍucōdyamidakhiḷōrvvige toḍavidu bhūlakṣmigeṁdu baṇnise palaruṁ niḍuvaṇiyoḷintu māḷkumēṁ kaḍucelvanenippa
viṣṇugṛhamaṁ barmmaṁ . paḍedapeveṁdu nettiya bemaru miḍiyiṁdiḷivantu dukkadalu duḍiyutamirpparallade jasaṁbaḍeva
llige dharmmadalligēṁ biḍuvare poṁnanokkaligaramma babāppene viṣṇugēhamaṁ niḍuvaṇi yalli māḍisida mēṇḍeya barmmaṇanantirōrvvaruṁ .
giḍugaḍidurttu bitti phalamaṁ paḍeduṇnade lābalōbadiṁ maḍagi baḷikke gāvaṇige gaṁṭige ṭopparaviṭṭu koḷvaniggaḍi nripaṅgatta tettu
baṟidāgi begaḷmogadiṁdavirppa beḷguḍiyaranēke pōlisuve barmmaṇanoḷu hitadharmma kāryyanoḷ . tānuṇnade peṟarggi
kkade pēniya pervvuḍukeyenisi maḍagade dhanamaṁ mānavaratnaṁ barmmaṇanānaṁdade viṣṇubhavanamaṁ māḍi
sidaṁ . Eṁba pogarttegaḷuṁbamāgi mēṇḍeya barmmaṇaṁ māḍisida dharmmakkanukūḷarāgi yamaniya
masvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīlasaṁpannarappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ niḍuva
ṇiyūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁgaḷuṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ tarddavāḍināḍa perggaḍe da
ṇḍanāyakaṁ lakṣmarasanumirddu śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 40 neya manmatha saṁvatsarada puṣya su 6 vaḍḍavāradaṁ
duttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇaparvvanimittaṁ śrī kēśavadēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ nandādīvigegaṁ caitrapavitrakkaṁ
goraviya keṟeya baṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu haṁcigevaṭṭeyiṁ mūḍalu māṇikēśvarada kōlalu sarvvanamasyamāgi biṭṭa
dōṇiya mattaru mūvattu gāṇavoṁdu tōṇṭavoṁdu Ī dharmmavanarasugaḷuṁ mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ pratipā
ḷisuvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . tannittu
du peṟarittudadennade pāḷisidoḍarasugaḷgihaparasaukhyaṁ niṭṭeyakkuvaḷidaṁdannayavuṁnnuṁ
nnavenaladhōgatigiḷiguṁ . bahubhirvvasudhā datta rājabhiḥ sagarādibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā
bhūmistasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . keḍedoḍeda dēvabhavanaṁ kiḍadantire māḍidaṁgenālvaḍi puṇyaṁ kiḍisalu
samartthanappaṁ kiḍisade kādaṁdu dharmmavirmmaḍi diṭadiṁ .
Digital edition of SII 18.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
